feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Calculations in a specific planning version
entry.content:
Good morning,
I am creating a story where I am copying data from the actual version to the planning version. When the data is copied to planning, it increases the gross salary calculation based on parameters. These parameters are associated with January 2024, and in the Data Action, the calculation is also linked to January 2024.

I have one button for copying and another button for the calculation. However, when I execute the calculation, it does not work. Could you assist me in resolving this issue?

I will send screenshots to provide more context to the question.

The purpose of the table is that in January 2025, a 50% increase is applied to "Rec1," meaning it should have 1,200 euros plus 50%.

Thanks in advance,

Ganjos

entry.title: Tenant and domain in SAP Analytic Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I have a question about SAP Analytics Cloud versions. For one client, I have the information summarized in the attached screenshot "ClientWithDifferentTenant.png," where the SAC tenant has the following domain: "https://******q.eu10.analytics.cloud.sap" Meanwhile, for most other clients, I have the configuration shown in the screenshot "ClientHCSTenant.png," and the tenant has the following domain: "https://******.eu10.hcs.cloud.sap"

Could you please explain the difference between these two SAC versions? Are there any limitations associated with the "analytics.cloud" tenant?

Thanks

Dino

entry.title: How can I consume CDS View I_AccountingDocumentType in SAC, which steps are necessary?
entry.content:
I currently have a connection between SAC and S4 HANA and I'm trying to read the CDS View  I_AccountingDocumentType , it can be seen in system but its not available in SAC. What steps should I take? Is it by default not available?

Thanks

entry.title: Table Bugging dimensions
entry.content:
Hello team,

I have a planning model with two dimensions: "Resources" and "Departments."
There are 5 departments, each with specific resources, as shown in the first image.

The issue is that when I add a new table, it creates duplicate "Resources" without any values in others departments. This disrupts one of our functionalities, preventing us from continuing with the project. I don’t understand why new "Resources" are being generated every time a new table is added.

I’ll provide an example of the "Resources" being created by the table, but this is just one case – the table often creates new resources for other departments randomly, with null values. Meanwhile, the original "Resource" with values remains in the correct department.
Inside the model, the resources are being created multiple times in other departments too, and the original still remains in the original department

Thanks for all the help, have a nice day

Bernardo Santos

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Excel Add-In Add Rows/Columns Overwriting Formulas
entry.content:
I am trying to utilize the 'Add Rows/Columns' feature in the SAP Analytics Cloud excel add-in but have an issue where the table rewrites my formula. Please see below for example:

I create the column and attempt to subtract BUD from Actual:

After hitting enter the system the table refreshes and replaces my formula with a new (and quite useless) new formula.  For some reason it changed what I had original referenced (C7) with a new cell (D7):

I have tried checking and unchecking the Optimized Planning Area and Planning Enabled features but the same problem still persists.  Any help is appreciated!

entry.title: How can I drill down gl transaction detail in SAC?
entry.content:
Hi

Is it possible to view in SAC all the transactions posted to a gl for any point in time? As an example, I have the consulting gl for December for a particular cost center. I want to be able to view in SAC all the transaction that made up the total amount of consulting gl for December. This means that I want to see in SAC all the S4HANA data for this gl.
I have tried hyperlink but it does not work.

Anyone has any idea how this can be accomplished?

entry.title: SAP Integrated Planning usage in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

In my customer landscape SAP BW 7.5 on HANA DB used extensively for Integrated planning application using the BEx queries.

We plan to move on to SAP Analytics Cloud platform, we would like to utilize all the back-end developments in SAP GUI like Aggregation, planning sequences.

Is that possible from SAC?

Best Regards,

Vasanth

entry.title: SAC Live Connection Report is failed to refresh
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have created a story based on top of SAC live connection model and story is displaying with blank when we open and tried at query designer for the same combinations, and it is failing due to memory issue. is there any specific setting to increase/update for memory? Attached the error screenshot for the same.

 



Thanks.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud: Issue with 000 period from ACDOCU table
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have created a query using data from the ACDOCU table in S/4HANA database and we noticed that the field FISCYEARPER shows a period equal to 000. This issue is causing our SAC Dashboard to reject all rows with a period of 000.

Steps to reproduce
Step 1: Create a new custom cds view using data from the ACDOCU table in S/4HANA database.
Step 2: Create a new model in SAC which based on the custom cds view from step 1.
Step 3:  The field FISCYEARPER shows a period equal to 000 which is rejecting all rows with a period of 000.

Do you have any idea how to deal with this?
Thank you in advance!

#sapanalyticscloud

entry.title: OSE + table + selection type: single + left click => no onSelect
entry.content:
Hi,
could anyone with SAC and a live BW connection please confirm that onSelect is not triggerd by a left click (but with a right click) when:

  • unified story mode used
  • live BW connection (ours: 7.5 SP 31)
  • table with 1 measure in columns & 1 dimension in rows
  • selection type: single

     


    A single left click in the table should trigger the onSelect event. This is not the case anymore. Now in order to trigger onSelect you have to right click into the table.
    When Selection Type is set to Default then a left click triggers onSelect.

ty for your help
BR
E.

entry.title: Working with HANA CV / MDS Cubes. Do not see any additional Dimensions available besides Private.
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,

I have been investigating HANA CV / MDS cubes for possible SAC performance improvements.  Have a standard star schema, 1 Aggregation using a table as data source which is joined to 2 Dimension CV's. Pretty straight forward.  Have the join cardinality and join type acceptable for MDS ( no error messages ) . Issue: When I go to select the "dimension" attributes, I can only see the private attributes of the Aggregation and the names of each of the joined dimensional CV's. I do not have the ability to select any of the attributes in the joined dimensions. I have looked at all the docs/ SAP help and tutorials and researched under SAP 4Me notes. Cannot find a reason for this behavior. How can I add the attributes from the joined dimensional CV's ?

I appreciate any help on this. Images are attached.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Property Count
entry.content:
Hi!

I would like to know if it's possible to count the frequency with which the name appears in a property in a dimension, for example, I have a dimension called names and in this dimension I have a property with repeated names, I want to count the frequency with which the same name appears, It's possible to do this via data action in SAC?

entry.title: OData Script API Payload to SAC Custom Widget
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We are attempting to compile a customer use case for an ad-hoc SAC import using a combination of the OData Scripting Widget and a Custom Widget.  The custom widget would handle the SAC Import Data POST API call and take the JSON payload based on user selections from the SAC story that are passed first to the OData Scripting Widget.  We created the OData Scripting connection to our S/4HANA On-Premise system as follows:

We then leverage the standard getEntitiesFromEntitySet capability and pass in a filter which is derived from some user selections in a helper function. I am storing in a variable ‘ret’ for further processing.

I can observe my JSON payload from the OData getEntitiesfromEntitySet as shown below – this is working fine.

But, I am currently stuck, as the limited JavaScript for Custom Widgets does not seems to be able to recognize this dynamic array object as a function argument input. Would the community have any hints to how I could pass this payload into a custom widget for further processing as a function argument? It’s like it does not recognize the OData payload as an object it can work with. Has anyone successfully done something like this?

"DynamicTypes.QCF410SEGALLOC.ODataResults.entitySetZBPC_SEG_ALLOCArray" to "Unknown Type"

entry.title: Connexion SAP LBN GTT with SAC possible ?
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to know if we can connect SAP Logistics Business Network Global Track and Trace with SAP Analytics Cloud ?
If yes, can you provide me some details please. 

Thank you,

entry.title: Percentage in cross model
entry.content:
Hi team,

I am working on a project that involves two associated models. One model contains human resources and departments, where I calculated the costs of each department divided by the total department costs (Percentage). It is important to note that the departments are organized in a hierarchy that includes resources (REC1, REC2, REC3, etc.). However, I also have a department dimension that lists the departments, but it is not being used. I should mention that I tried linking the models through this dimension, but it didn’t retrieve the calculated measure with the percentage mentioned earlier.

In the other model, I have general expenses (electricity, rent, etc.), as well as departments with specific costs and specific expenses. What I want to achieve is to multiply the general expenses by the percentage from the human resources model. Is it possible to accomplish this?

Thanks in Advance

Ganjos

entry.title: Calling same story different users different colors
entry.content: Two different users call up the same SAP Analytics Cloud Story, the diagram (chart) colors are different for both. Why is that so? The original color is green. For the other user it turns to orange and blue. What could be the reason?

entry.title: How to use Excel Add-in for SAC for public Dimension with read & write property ?
entry.content:
My requirement is to open a model's public dimension including read and write properties on excel. Is there a way to download this list fully and continue working on excel?  Currently i am doing this by copy-paste operation. But i would like to automate the process by calling from excel addin so that i dont have to navigate myself to public dimension of the model's page everytime.

When i try to call the model from excel it does not show me the read, write property which i need in my requirement.

Does anyone have a similiar experience or an idea on how to solve?

Thanks in advance!

SAP Analytics Cloud #SAC Addin for Excel

entry.title: User Creation in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’ve come across a strange behavior in our SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) and was wondering if anyone else has experienced something similar or might have a solution.

The Issue: I recently created a new user, and I noticed that this user does not have the hourglass icon (symbol for “status in progress”) displayed, whereas other newly created users in the same system do show the hourglass icon.

Could this be due to a synchronization delay or possibly a bug?

entry.title: Can we pass table values as prompts to another view within a story with SAP Datasphere live con?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a live connection from SAP Datasphere to SAC. There is a prompt for GL account, where user can select a hierarchy node when the story opens for the first time. My requirement is when the leaf node is selected from this hierarchy in the table within the story, it should open another page/popup with another view as GL leaf member as selection.

Is it possible to pass the values from table to popup filters within the story? Anyone who has faced this issue or knows the workaround in this case. Their comments would be deeply appreciated. Thanks

entry.title: Scheduled publication in SAC (SAP Analytics Cloud) scheduled to run every month end (31st) fails
entry.content:
Hi,

The scheduled publication which is supposed to run every month end (please see the image). Earlier, this used to fail sometimes but ran occasionally but now it has been failing with an open status for the last three months. Please suggest a fix to get it running every month.

Regards,

Madhu
